text: This subchapter applies only to high-speed rail operated by a private entity.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 112. Powers & Duties of Railroads
##### § 112.202 — Applicability

This subchapter applies only to high-speed rail operated by a private entity.

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1118 (S.B.975), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2017.*

subsections.text: This subchapter applies only to high-speed rail operated by a private entity.
